details.test: Task 1: Order two workplace first aid kits
Task 2: Compare two products and add lighter one to cart
Task 3: Add three items across two products from same brand
Task 4: Request a quote for a product bundle
Task 5: Save a first aid kit to wishlist and reopen from wishlist
Task 6: Add most-reviewed product (smart alarm analogue) to cart
Task 7: Schedule Fire Alarm Inspection service
Task 8: Order five units of a product with Standard Shipping
Task 9: Add three size variants of same product to cart
